articles.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
articles.preview: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.

articles.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
articles.preview: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.
articles.full_text: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

articles.title: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant, Moscow fuel hub
articles.preview: The two attacks, in Volgograd and Vladimir regions, are part of President Zelenskyy's strategy to bring the war to the Russian people and force Putin into peace negotiations.
articles.full_text: The two attacks, in Volgograd and Vladimir regions, are part of President Zelenskyy's strategy to bring the war to the Russian people and force Putin into peace negotiations.
articles.meta_description: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant, Moscow fuel hub

articles.title: Thousands show up at Hong Lim Park for 18th Pink Dot rally
articles.preview: This is the fourth year of Pink Dot since the repeal of Section 377A, a decades-old law criminalising gay sex.
articles.full_text: This is the fourth year of Pink Dot since the repeal of Section 377A, a decades-old law criminalising gay sex.
